Bash(cd /Users/Andreas/development/PHP/phpbb33_extensions/avathar/bbguild_wow && gh issue create --title "3-level achievement browser \(categories → list → detail\)" --body "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Description

Replace the current flat achievement display with a 3-level drill-down browser matching the Blizzard armory style \(see screenshots in `contrib/level1.png`, `level2.png`, `level3.png`\).

### Level 1 — Category Overview
- Display achievement categories as cards with circular progress rings
- Each card shows: category name, completion percentage \(ring\), points earned
- Categories: General, Reputation, Quests, Player vs. Player, Dungeons & Raids, Professions, Guild Feats of Strength
- Click a category to drill into Level 2

### Level 2 — Achievement List
- Breadcrumb navigation back to Level 1
- Category name as heading
- List of achievements: icon \(18px\), title \(bold\), description, points \(gold badge\), completion date
- Scrollable, possibly paginated

### Level 3 — Achievement Detail
- Modal/overlay with close button \(X\)
- Large icon, title, description, points, completion date
- Criteria progress bar \(quantity / max\)

## Technical Requirements

### New Data
- **Achievement categories table** \(`bb_achievement_category`\) — stores Blizzard category hierarchy
- **Category ID on achievements** — add `category_id` column to `bb_achievement`
- **New API resource** — `battlenet_achievement_category` for `GET /data/wow/achievement-category/index` and `GET /data/wow/achievement-category/{id}`

### API Sync
- Extend `setAchievements\(\)` or add new method to fetch category index and assign categories to achievements
- Category data is static \(Blizzard-defined\), cache aggressively

### Frontend
- Portal module renders Level 1 by default
- JS-driven drill-down \(AJAX or show/hide\) for Level 2 and Level 3
- CSS for circular progress rings, achievement list, detail modal
- All within the existing portal module block

### Migration
- New migration to add `bb_achievement_category` table and `category_id` column to `bb_achievement`

## Screenshots
See `contrib/level1.png`, `contrib/level2.png`, `contrib/level3.png` for reference design.
EOF
\)")
